login.title: Designer login
login.hint: Paste the token from your salon to open your inbox.
login.label: Designer token

qr.title: My QR code
qr.hint: When a guest scans this QR, they'll be assigned to me.

help.title: Sotong guide
help.subtitle: Set up once and you're done.
help.notifyTitle: ① First time — turn on notifications
help.notifyBody: Adding to the home screen alone won't deliver alerts. Open the app (home-screen icon) and tap ‘Turn on notifications → Allow’. On iPhone, requires iOS 16.4+ and must be done inside the installed app.
help.flowBody: Push alert → guest summary in inbox → [Start consultation] translated chat → [Start service] → 30-sec record → report auto-sent to the guest.
help.photoTitle: ③ Record needs both before & after photos
help.photoBody: You must capture both before and after photos to send the report (rear camera, the treated area). For returning guests, last visit's products & condition are pre-filled.
help.tip: If alerts don't arrive, ask the owner for your ‘current inbox link’. Old links won't open the inbox.

inbox.title: Waiting guests
inbox.subtitle: Consultations that came in today
inbox.invalid: Invalid inbox address. Please check with the salon admin.
inbox.assignFailed: Couldn't take it. Please try again.

notify.title: New guest alerts
notify.description: Get notified on your phone the moment a new guest checks in.
notify.denied: Notifications are blocked. Allow notifications in your browser settings and try again.
notify.success: Notifications are on. We'll let you know when a new guest arrives.
notify.failed: Couldn't turn on notifications. Please try again.
notify.iosHint: On iPhone, install via the Safari share button (bottom center) → 'Add to Home Screen', then open the Sotong icon on your home screen and tap 'Turn on notifications'. (You can't enable notifications from a Safari tab.)

summary.notFound: Consultation not found. Please check the link.
summary.startServiceFailed: Couldn't start the service. Please try again.

thread.translatedNote: Automatically translated into the guest's language
thread.sendError: Couldn't send the message. Please try again.
